title: Investment Advisor Takes New Position in Professional Services Stock, According to Latest SEC Filing
author: Jake Lerch
description: GatePass Capital, LLC acquired 98,163 shares of CBIZ in a $3.46 million transaction during Q1 2026. Despite CBIZ stock declining 56.5% over the past year due to disappointing earnings and lowered guidance, the investment advisor may see value in the stock's low P/S ratio of 0.7x, well below its 10-year average of 1.5x.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Stock has declined 56.5% over the past year, underperforming S&P 500 by 85 percentage points. Company delivered disappointing Q1 earnings with revenue below expectations and lowered guidance citing demand uncertainty. However, the low valuation metrics (P/S ratio of 0.7x) may attract value investors.

title: Waters Parkerson Bets $3 Million on a CBIZ Rebound
author: Andy Gould
description: Waters Parkerson added 85,796 shares of CBIZ worth $3 million in Q1 2026, increasing its stake to 523,042 shares valued at $14 million. The move is contrarian, as CBIZ shares have fallen 51% over the past year due to integration challenges from its November 2024 acquisition of Marcum LLP. While the acquisition boosted 2025 revenue 52% to $2.8 billion, organic growth was modest at 2%. Waters Parkerson's purchase suggests confidence that integration headwinds will be temporary.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mixed signals: significant insider buying by Waters Parkerson suggests confidence in recovery, but the stock has underperformed severely (-51% YoY, -79 percentage points vs S&P 500). Integration challenges from the Marcum acquisition are temporary headwinds, but execution risk remains. Modest organic growth (2%) and improving FCF guidance provide some support, but near-term uncertainty persists.

title: CBIZ to Announce First-Quarter 2026 Results on April 29, 2026
author: Not Specified
description: CBIZ, Inc. (NYSE: CBZ) will announce its first quarter 2026 financial results after market close on April 29, 2026, followed by a conference call with President and CEO Jerry Grisko and CFO Brad Lakhia at 5:00 p.m. ET. The company is a leading professional services advisor to middle-market businesses with over 9,500 team members across 23 major markets.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article is a routine earnings announcement with no forward-looking statements or performance indicators provided. It contains only procedural information about when and how results will be announced. The company's prior full-year 2025 results showed strong growth (52% revenue increase, 135% EPS increase), but this current article focuses solely on the announcement logistics without new performance data.

title: CBIZ Releases Q1 2026 Mid-Market Pulse Report: Business Leaders Prioritize Cost, Talent, and Tech Strategy
author: Cbiz, Inc.
description: CBIZ released its Q1 2026 Mid-Market Pulse Report based on insights from over 1,300 clients, revealing that middle-market business leaders are balancing cautious optimism with pragmatic cost management. Key priorities include cost optimization (84%), talent investment (43%), and technology modernization (41%), while challenges include rising labor costs and pricing pressures. CBIZ launched 'Insights. Applied.' to help organizations translate strategy into action.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: CBIZ demonstrates strong market positioning with over 1,300 clients providing feedback, successful launch of new service offering 'Insights. Applied.', and leadership expressing confidence in middle-market business outlook. The company is expanding its service portfolio to address client priorities in cost optimization, talent management, and technology strategy.

title: CBIZ’s 2026 Tax Planning Guide Offers a Roadmap for Smart, Strategic Tax Planning
author: Joseph Perry
description: CBIZ has published its 2026 Tax Planning Guide, detailing significant tax law updates from the One Big Beautiful Bill Act (OBBBA), offering strategies for businesses and individuals to navigate new tax provisions affecting research expenses, depreciation, and investment opportunities.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company is proactively providing comprehensive guidance on complex tax law changes, positioning itself as a thought leader in tax strategy and professional services
